name: Lou Malnati's Pizzeria
ai_summary: This Chicago-style deep-dish pizzeria on Elmhurst Road is known for its buttery, crispy-edged crusts and generous cheese-and-sauce-filled pies that require a fork and knife to eat.
hours:
Monday: 4:00 – 10:00 PM
Tuesday: 4:00 – 10:00 PM
Wednesday: 4:00 – 10:00 PM
Thursday: 4:00 – 10:00 PM
Friday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
Saturday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
Sunday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM
last_visit_notes: Two pizzas for dinner. Scout home from surgery so no time to cook
